original_query: select     sum(ws_ext_discount_amt)  as "Excess Discount Amount" from     web_sales    ,item    ,date_dim where (i_manufact_id BETWEEN 749 and 948 or i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')) and i_item_sk = ws_item_sk and d_date between '2001-01-31' and         cast('2001-01-31' as date) + interval '90' day and d_date_sk = ws_sold_date_sk and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 57 AND 77 and ws_ext_discount_amt      > (          SELECT             1.3 * avg(ws_ext_discount_amt)          FROM             web_sales            ,date_dim          WHERE               ws_item_sk = i_item_sk           and d_date between '2001-01-31' and                              cast('2001-01-31' as date) + interval '90' day           and d_date_sk = ws_sold_date_sk           and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 57 AND 77           and ws_sales_price / ws_list_price BETWEEN 17 * 0.01 AND 32 * 0.01   ) order by sum(ws_ext_discount_amt) limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH item_avg_discount AS (
    SELECT 
        ws_item_sk,
        1.3 * AVG(ws_ext_discount_amt) AS threshold
    FROM 
        web_sales
        JOIN date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    WHERE 
        date_dim.d_date BETWEEN '2001-01-31' AND '2001-01-31'::date + interval '90' day
        AND web_sales.ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 57 AND 77
        AND web_sales.ws_sales_price / web_sales.ws_list_price BETWEEN 0.17 AND 0.32
    GROUP BY ws_item_sk
)
SELECT 
    SUM(web_sales.ws_ext_discount_amt) AS "Excess Discount Amount"
FROM 
    web_sales
    JOIN item ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN item_avg_discount iad ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = iad.ws_item_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_date BETWEEN '2001-01-31' AND '2001-01-31'::date + interval '90' day
    AND web_sales.ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 57 AND 77
    AND (item.i_manufact_id BETWEEN 749 AND 948 OR item.i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports'))
    AND web_sales.ws_ext_discount_amt > iad.threshold
ORDER BY SUM(web_sales.ws_ext_discount_amt)
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replace correlated subquery with a CTE to avoid executing the subquery for each row of the outer query
Use explicit JOIN syntax instead of comma-separated tables in the FROM clause
Pre-compute the threshold values for each item in a CTE and join with the main query
